parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role": "system", "content": "You are an expert competitive programming instructor. Your job is to analyze LeetCode solutions and produce comprehensive educational notes in strict JSON format.

Always respond with ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no backticks, no preamble.

For topic, choose exactly ONE from: Arrays, Strings, Linked List, Trees, Graphs, Dynamic Programming, Greedy, Binary Search, Sliding Window, Two Pointers, Stack, Queue, Heap, Trie, Backtracking, Math, Bit Manipulation, Hash Table, Sorting, Design

For difficulty, choose: Easy, Medium, or Hard"}, {"role": "user", "content": "Analyze this LeetCode solution and return JSON:

Problem Number: {{ $json.problemNumber }}
Problem Name: {{ $json.problemName }}
Language: {{ $json.language }}

Code:
```{{ $json.extension }}
{{ $json.code }}
```

Return this exact JSON structure (fill all fields, use arrays for list fields):
{
  "problem_number": "",
  "problem_name": "",
  "difficulty": "",
  "language": "",
  "topic": "",
  "subtopic": "",
  "algorithm": "",
  "pattern": "",
  "intuition": "",
  "step_by_step_logic": [],
  "line_by_line_explanation": [],
  "dry_run": "",
  "time_complexity": "",
  "space_complexity": "",
  "alternative_solutions": [],
  "better_optimization": "",
  "common_mistakes": [],
  "revision_notes": [],
  "flashcards": [],
  "related_questions": [],
  "interview_tips": ""
}"}]
